testcase.name: test_generate_streaming

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len('') + where '' = <built-in method join of str object at 0xfa36f4440be8>([]) + where <built-in method join of str object at 0xfa36f4440be8> = ''.join

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:222: in test_generate_streaming assert len("".join(chunks)) > 0 E AssertionError: assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len('') E + where '' = <built-in method join of str object at 0xfa36f4440be8>([]) E + where <built-in method join of str object at 0xfa36f4440be8> = ''.join

testcase.name: test_latest_after_generate

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (None) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa36f16396c0>('text') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa36f16396c0> = {'generated_at': None, 'text': None}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:237: in test_latest_after_generate assert body.get("text") and len(body["text"]) > 20 E AssertionError: assert (None) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa36f16396c0>('text') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa36f16396c0> = {'generated_at': None, 'text': None}.get
